user.title: Solar Forecast ML
user.description:
Required: Power Sensor, Daily Yield
Optional: All other fields

☀️ Weather data is provided automatically via Open-Meteo API (no configuration needed)

Battery Management v9.0.0 (optional):
• Watt-based system for precise energy flow analysis
• 8 clear sensors (all positive except Battery: +/-)
• Required: Battery Power, SOC, Solar Production, Inverter Output, Grid Import, Grid Export, House Consumption

data_description.solar_yield_today: Daily yield in kWh - MUST reset at midnight (Required)
data_description.grid_import_today: Grid import in kWh - Energy from grid (Optional, improves autarky calculation)
data_description.grid_export_today: Grid export in kWh - Energy to grid (Optional)
data_description.solar_capacity: Peak power in kWp, e.g., 5.5 (Optional, default: 5.0)
data_description.solar_radiation_sensor: External solar radiation in W/m² (Optional, preferred over Lux)
data_description.battery_capacity: Battery capacity in kWh (Optional, for battery management)
data_description.solar_production_sensor: [v9.0.0] Solar DC production from panels in W (≥0)
data_description.inverter_output_sensor: [v9.0.0] Inverter AC output to house in W (≥0) - Combined Solar+Battery
data_description.grid_import_sensor: [v9.0.0] Grid import power in W (≥0) - Power from public grid
data_description.grid_export_sensor: [v9.0.0] Grid export power in W (≥0) - Power to public grid
data_description.grid_charge_power_sensor: [v9.0.0 Optional] Grid charge power in W (≥0) - Auto-calculated if not provided
data_description.battery_temperature_sensor: [v9.0.0 Optional] Battery temperature in °C - For advanced analysis
data_description.electricity_country: Country for electricity prices - Germany (DE) or Austria (AT) (Optional)

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Solar Forecast ML
reconfigure.description:
Update configuration
Empty optional fields will clear their value

☀️ Weather data is provided automatically via Open-Meteo API

Battery Management v9.0.0:
• Configure all 8 sensors for energy flow analysis
• All positive values except Battery Power (+/-)
• Old LEGACY fields are automatically ignored

data_description.solar_yield_today: Daily yield in kWh - MUST reset at midnight (Required)
data_description.grid_import_today: Grid import in kWh - Energy from grid (Optional, improves autarky calculation)
data_description.grid_export_today: Grid export in kWh - Energy to grid (Optional)
data_description.solar_capacity: Peak power in kWp, e.g., 5.5 (Optional, default: 5.0)
data_description.solar_radiation_sensor: External solar radiation in W/m² (Optional, preferred over Lux)
data_description.battery_capacity: Battery capacity in kWh (Optional, for battery management)
data_description.solar_production_sensor: [v9.0.0] Solar DC production from panels in W (≥0)
data_description.inverter_output_sensor: [v9.0.0] Inverter AC output to house in W (≥0) - Combined Solar+Battery
data_description.grid_import_sensor: [v9.0.0] Grid import power in W (≥0) - Power from public grid
data_description.grid_export_sensor: [v9.0.0] Grid export power in W (≥0) - Power to public grid
data_description.grid_charge_power_sensor: [v9.0.0 Optional] Grid charge power in W (≥0) - Auto-calculated if not provided
data_description.battery_temperature_sensor: [v9.0.0 Optional] Battery temperature in °C - For advanced analysis
data_description.electricity_country: Country for electricity prices - Germany (DE) or Austria (AT) (Optional)

init.title: Advanced Options
init.description:
Configure update intervals and notifications
Battery sensors are configured via 'Reconfigure'

data_description.battery_enabled: Enable battery monitoring and forecasts (configure sensors via Reconfigure)
data_description.electricity_enabled: Enable electricity spot prices from aWATTar (configure country via Reconfigure)
data_description.ml_algorithm: Choose algorithm: 'Automatic' lets system decide based on available data (recommended). 'Ridge' is fast and stable. 'Neural Network' provides 5-10% better accuracy with 100+ samples.
data_description.enable_tiny_lstm: Allow use of Neural Network (requires 100+ samples, 200+ MB RAM). Falls back to Ridge automatically if requirements not met. Recommended: Keep enabled.

train_model.name: Train ML Model
train_model.description: Manually trigger ML model training with collected production data

force.name: Force Training
force.description: Force training even if minimum samples not reached

clear_training_data.name: Clear Training Data
clear_training_data.description: Delete all collected training samples (requires confirmation)

reset_model.name: Reset ML Model
reset_model.description: Reset trained model and switch to rule-based forecast

model_training_failed.title: ML Model Training Failed
model_training_failed.description:
Training failed: {error}
Check logs for details.

insufficient_data.title: Insufficient Training Data
insufficient_data.description: Need {required} samples, have {current}. Continue collecting data.

weather_api_error.title: Weather API Error
weather_api_error.description:
Weather API unavailable: {error}
Using fallback forecast.
